name: PAX Grip Sleeve
summary: Enhance your grip with ease by utilizing the PAX Grip Sleeve.
description: Enhance your grip with ease by utilizing the PAX Grip Sleeve. This innovative product provides a secure hold, allowing for greater control and stability with your PAX 2, PAX 3, or Pax Plus vaporiser, then the PAX Grip Sleeve is the perfect solution. Designed to fit all PAX devices snugly and securely, this silicone sleeve offers a comfortable grip and a touch of vibrant colour. Its ergonomic shape is expertly crafted to effortlessly fit into your hand, providing a firmer hold on your device while you indulge in your vaping experience. Keeps your kit protected and discreet in transit.
